```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(sf)
library(vcfR)

source(here("general_functions.R"))
source(here("analysis", "gea", "functions_selection_stats.R"))
outpath <- here("analysis", "gea", "outputs")
plotpath <- here("analysis", "gea", "plots")
ca <- get_ca()
```

```{r}
df <- read_csv(here(outpath, "bio1ndvi_gea_gene_nonsyn.csv"))

# Load dosage data
dos <- read_table(here("analysis", "gea", "outputs", "genes.raw"))

# Load coords and model dataframe
coords <- 
  get_coords(sf = TRUE) %>% 
  filter(SampleID %in% dos$IID) %>% 
  st_transform(3310) %>%
  # REMOVE CHANNEL ISLAND
  filter(SampleID != "Scelocci_CCGPMC_MW01-3-14") 

# Subset to only samples in coords
dos <- dos[dos$IID %in% coords$SampleID, ]

# Confirm orders are the same
stopifnot(all(dos$IID == coords$SampleID))

# CORRECT DOS NAMES
colnames(dos) <- gsub("_[A-Z]$", "", colnames(dos))
```

```{r}
plot_genes <- function(gene, gene_name = NULL, df){
  if (is.null(gene_name)) gene_name = gene
  gene_loci <- df %>% filter(grepl(gene, full_name)) %>% pull(locus)
  if (length(gene_loci) == 0) {
    warning("No loci found for ", gene, "; Skipping")
    return(NULL)
  }

  gene_dos <- dos[, gene_loci]
  gene_dos$SampleID <- dos$IID

  nona_dos <- 
    gene_dos %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.), median(., na.rm = TRUE), .)))

  gene_df <- 
    coords %>% 
    left_join(gene_dos, by = "SampleID")  %>%
    pivot_longer(-c(SampleID, geometry), names_to = "locus", values_to = "dos")

  plt1 <- 
    ggplot(gene_df) +
    geom_sf(data = ca) +
    geom_sf(aes(col = dos)) +
    scale_color_viridis_c() +
    theme_void() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    labs(title = gene_name) +
    facet_wrap(~locus)

  if (ncol(dos) < 2) {
    return(list(dos = plt1, pca = NULL))
  }
  
  gene_pca <- prcomp(select(nona_dos, -SampleID))

  gene_df <- 
    coords %>% 
    left_join(gene_dos, by = "SampleID") %>%
    mutate(PC1 = gene_pca$x[, 1]) %>%
    pivot_longer(-c(SampleID, geometry, PC1), names_to = "locus", values_to = "dos")

  plt2 <-
    ggplot(gene_df) +
    geom_sf(data = ca) +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = PC1), pch = 21, cex = 2, col = rgb(0,0,0,0)) +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "turbo") +
    theme_void() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    labs(title = gene_name) 
  
  return(list(dos = plt1, pca = plt2))
}

genes <- get_goi_names()

plt_list <- imap(genes, \(x, i) plot_genes(gene = x, gene_name = i, df)) %>% compact()

plt_dos <- map(plt_list, pluck, "dos")
plt_pca <- map(plt_list, pluck, "pca") %>% compact()

pdf(here(plotpath, "maps_of_gea_genes.pdf"), width = 8, height = 8)
plt_dos
dev.off()

pdf(here(plotpath, "maps_of_gea_gene_pcas.pdf"), width = 15, height = 10)
cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plt_pca, nrow = 2)
dev.off()

```


# Compare HSP70 and temperature

```{r}
mod_df <- read_csv(here("analysis", "genetic_diversity", "outputs", "model_df.csv"))
coords_df <- left_join(coords, mod_df)

gene_loci <- 
  df %>% filter(grepl("Heat shock", full_name)) %>% pull(locus)
gene_dos <- dos[, gene_loci]
gene_dos$SampleID <- dos$IID

nona_dos <- 
  gene_dos %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.), median(., na.rm = TRUE), .)))

gene_pca <- prcomp(select(nona_dos, -SampleID))

gene_df <- 
  coords_df %>% 
  left_join(gene_dos, by = "SampleID") %>%
  mutate(PC1 = gene_pca$x[, 1])   

pdf(here(plotpath, "gene_map.pdf"), width = 8, height = 8)
ggplot(gene_df, aes(y = PC1, x = bio1)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  geom_point()
dev.off()

summary(lm(PC1 ~ bio1, data = gene_df))

cor_results <- map_dfr(select(nona_dos, -SampleID), ~{
  cor_result <- cor.test(.x, gene_df$bio1)
  tibble(r = cor_result$estimate, p = cor_result$p.value)
})
cor_results$locus <- colnames(select(nona_dos, -SampleID))

cor_results %>% arrange(desc(abs(r))) 
#  1 -0.340  0.0000108 chr2_103247522_G_C
#  2 -0.328  0.0000224 chr5_153615785_C_T
#  3  0.249  0.00152   chr9_25970915_C_T 
#  4 -0.244  0.00190   chr9_25967268_G_A 
#  5 -0.235  0.00274   chr9_25986335_C_T 
#  6  0.201  0.0109    chr9_25967457_C_T 
#  7  0.199  0.0116    chr9_25986389_C_T 
#  8  0.176  0.0264    chr2_103247737_G_C
#  9 -0.156  0.0492    chr1_366003709_G_C
# 10 -0.0834 0.294     chr5_187268636_C_T
# 11  0.0757 0.341     chr3_213287000_G_C
# 12 -0.0279 0.726     chr9_25966826_G_A 
# 2 -0.328  0.0000224 chr5_153615785_C_T
 3  0.249  0.00152   chr9_25970915_C_T 
 4 -0.244  0.00190   chr9_25967268_G_A 
 5 -0.235  0.00274   chr9_25986335_C_T 
 6  0.201  0.0109    chr9_25967457_C_T 
 7  0.199  0.0116    chr9_25986389_C_T 
 8  0.176  0.0264    chr2_103247737_G_C
 9 -0.156  0.0492    chr1_366003709_G_C
10 -0.0834 0.294     chr5_187268636_C_T
11  0.0757 0.341     chr3_213287000_G_C
12 -0.0279 0.726     chr9_25966826_G_A 
```


```{r}
mod_df <- read_csv(here("analysis", "genetic_diversity", "outputs", "model_df.csv"))
coords_df <- left_join(coords, mod_df)

gene_loci <- 
  df %>% filter(grepl("TRPM8", full_name)) %>% pull(locus)
dos <- dos[dos$IID %in% coords_df$SampleID, ]
gene_dos <- dos[, gene_loci]
gene_dos$SampleID <- dos$IID

nona_dos <- 
  gene_dos %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.), median(., na.rm = TRUE), .)))

gene_pca <- prcomp(select(nona_dos, -SampleID))

gene_df <- 
  coords_df %>% 
  right_join(gene_dos, by = "SampleID") %>%
  mutate(PC1 = gene_pca$x[, 1])   

pdf(here(plotpath, "gene_map2.pdf"), width = 4, height = 4)
ggplot(gene_df, aes(y = PC1, x = bio1)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  geom_point()

ggplot(gene_df, aes(y = chr5_7801341_G_A, x = bio1)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  geom_point()

ggplot(gene_df, aes(y = chr5_7801341_G_A, x = tmean_dif)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  geom_point()
dev.off()

summary(lm(PC1 ~ bio1, data = gene_df))

cor_results <- map_dfr(select(nona_dos, -SampleID), ~{
  cor_result <- cor.test(.x, gene_df$bio1)
  tibble(r = cor_result$estimate, p = cor_result$p.value)
})
cor_results$locus <- colnames(select(nona_dos, -SampleID))

cor_results %>% arrange(desc(abs(r))) 
#        r          p locus                                              
#    <dbl>      <dbl> <chr>                                              
# 1 -0.360 0.00000295 chr5_7801341_G_A                                   
# 2 -0.266 0.000685   Scaffold_138__1_contigs__length_2391489_2298866_T_C
# 3  0.250 0.00144    chr5_7833956_A_C                                   
# 4 -0.105 0.188      Scaffold_138__1_contigs__length_2391489_2298855_C_T
```


# Similarity to core map

```{r}
mod_df <- 
  read_csv(here("analysis", "genetic_diversity", "outputs", "model_df.csv")) %>%
  left_join(get_pops()) %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = 4326)

socal_temp <- 
  mod_df %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  summarize(bio1 = mean(bio1, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  filter(cluster == 9) %>%
  pull(bio1)

mod_df <- mod_df %>% mutate(tempdif_from_socal = bio1 - socal_temp)

pdf(here(plotpath, "temp_dif_from_socal_map.pdf"), width = 5, height = 5)
ggplot(mod_df) +
  geom_sf(data = ca) +
  geom_sf(aes(col = tempdif_from_socal)) +
  scale_color_viridis_c() +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  labs(title = "Temperature difference from SoCal")
dev.off()
```
```{r}
socal_dif_test <- function(gene, gene_name = NULL, df, mod_df){
  if (is.null(gene_name)) gene_name = gene
  gene_loci <- df %>% filter(grepl(gene, full_name)) %>% pull(locus)
  if (length(gene_loci) == 0) {
    warning("No loci found for ", gene, "; Skipping")
    return(NULL)
  }

  dos <- dos[dos$IID %in% mod_df$SampleID, ]
  gene_dos <- dos[, gene_loci]
  gene_dos$SampleID <- dos$IID

  nona_dos <- 
    gene_dos %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.), median(., na.rm = TRUE), .)))

  gene_df <- 
    mod_df %>% 
    select(SampleID, tempdif_from_socal, geometry) %>%
    left_join(gene_dos, by = "SampleID")  %>%
    pivot_longer(-c(SampleID, geometry, tempdif_from_socal), names_to = "locus", values_to = "dos")

  cor_test <-
    gene_df %>%
    group_by(locus) %>%
    summarize(
      p_value = cor.test(dos, tempdif_from_socal, method = "pearson")$p.value,
      r = cor.test(dos, tempdif_from_socal, method = "pearson")$estimate
    ) %>%
    mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "fdr")) %>%
    filter(p_adj < 0.05) %>%
    st_drop_geometry()
  
  gene_df <- 
    gene_df %>% 
    right_join(cor_test, by = "locus") 
  
  nona_dos <- nona_dos[, c("SampleID", cor_test$locus)]
   
  plt1 <- 
    ggplot(sig_df) +
    geom_sf(data = ca) +
    geom_sf(aes(col = dos)) +
    scale_color_viridis_c() +
    theme_void() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    labs(title = gene_name) +
    facet_wrap(~locus)

  if (ncol(nona_dos) < 2) {
    return(list(dos = plt1, pca = NULL, gene_df = gene_df))
  }
  
  gene_pca <- prcomp(select(nona_dos, -SampleID))

  gene_df2 <- 
    mod_df %>% 
    select(SampleID, geometry) %>%
    left_join(gene_dos[, c("SampleID", cor_test$locus)], by = "SampleID") %>%
    mutate(PC1 = gene_pca$x[, 1]) %>%
    pivot_longer(-c(SampleID, geometry, PC1), names_to = "locus", values_to = "dos")

  plt2 <-
    ggplot(gene_df2) +
    geom_sf(data = ca) +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = PC1), pch = 21, cex = 2, col = rgb(0,0,0,0)) +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "turbo") +
    theme_void() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    labs(title = gene_name) 
  
  return(list(dos = plt1, pca = plt2, gene_df = gene_df))
}

genes <- get_goi_names()

plt_list <- imap(genes, \(x, i) socal_dif_test(gene = x, gene_name = i, df, mod_df)) %>% compact()

plt_dos <- map(plt_list, pluck, "dos")
plt_pca <- map(plt_list, pluck, "pca") %>% compact()
gene_df <- map(plt_list, pluck, "gene_df") %>% compact() %>% bind_rows(.id = "gene_name")

top <-
  gene_df %>% 
  group_by(locus) %>% 
  # WANT POSITIVE RELATIONSHIP
  arrange(desc((r))) %>% 
  slice(1:5) %>% 
  ungroup()


pdf(here(plotpath, "socal_tempdif_test.pdf"), width = 8, height = 8)
plt_dos

ggplot(top, aes(x = tempdif_from_socal, y = dos)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(se  = FALSE) + 
  facet_wrap(~gene_name + locus) 
dev.off()

```

# IDEA: Identify loci that are found in non-adjacent populations (bonus if those pops have similar climates)

```{r}
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(igraph)
dat <- 
  read_csv(here("analysis", "genetic_diversity", "outputs", "model_df.csv")) %>%
  left_join(get_pops()) %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = 4326) %>%
  st_transform(3310) %>%
  select(geometry, SampleID, cluster) %>%
  left_join(gene_dos) %>%
  pivot_longer(-c(SampleID, geometry, cluster), names_to = "locus", values_to = "dos") 

# Assume `dat` is your sf object with columns: cluster, locus, dos, geometry

# 1. Create Voronoi polygons based on point locations

bbox_expanded <- st_bbox(dat) + c(-1, -1, 1, 1)  # pad bbox to ensure complete cells
voronoi <- st_voronoi(st_union(dat), envelope = st_as_sfc(bbox_expanded))
voronoi <- st_collection_extract(voronoi)
voronoi_sf <- st_sf(geometry = st_cast(voronoi), cluster = dat$cluster)

# 2. Dissolve Voronoi cells by cluster to get one polygon per population
pop_polygons <- 
  voronoi_sf %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  summarize(geometry = st_union(geometry)) %>%
  ungroup()

# 3. Identify adjacency (touching polygons)
adj_mat <- st_touches(pop_polygons, sparse = FALSE)
rownames(adj_mat) <- colnames(adj_mat) <- pop_polygons$cluster

# Create graph of adjacency
adj_graph <- graph_from_adjacency_matrix(adj_mat, mode = "undirected")

# STEP 3: Calculate frequencies
freqs <- dat %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  group_by(cluster, locus) %>%
  summarize(freq = mean(dos, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# STEP 4: Identify non-adjacent pairs and apply logic
threshold <- 0.1
all_clusters <- unique(freqs$cluster)

non_adj_pairs <- combn(all_clusters, 2, simplify = FALSE) %>%
  keep(~ !are.connected(adj_graph, .x[1], .x[2]))

# STEP 4: Define thresholds
non_adj_threshold <- 0.4  # frequency must be > 0.4 in non-adjacent pops
adj_threshold <- 0.05      # frequency must be < 0.1 in adjacent pops

all_clusters <- unique(freqs$cluster)

non_adj_pairs <- combn(all_clusters, 2, simplify = FALSE) %>%
  keep(~ !are.connected(adj_graph, .x[1], .x[2]))

# STEP 5: Filter loci
result <- map_dfr(non_adj_pairs, function(pair) {
  pop1 <- pair[1]
  pop2 <- pair[2]

  # High-freq loci in both non-adjacent clusters
  f1 <- freqs %>% filter(cluster == pop1 & freq > non_adj_threshold)
  f2 <- freqs %>% filter(cluster == pop2 & freq > non_adj_threshold)

  common <- inner_join(f1, f2, by = "locus", suffix = c("_1", "_2"))

  if (nrow(common) == 0) return(NULL)

  # Get neighbors of both pops (excluding themselves)
  neighbors1 <- names(which(adj_mat[pop1, ]))
  neighbors2 <- names(which(adj_mat[pop2, ]))
  neighbors <- setdiff(unique(c(neighbors1, neighbors2)), pair)

  if (length(neighbors) == 0) return(common)  # skip if no neighbors to check

  # Frequencies in neighbor clusters
  neighbor_freqs <- freqs %>%
    filter(cluster %in% neighbors & locus %in% common$locus)

  # Disqualify loci with freq >= adj_threshold in any neighbor
  disqual_loci <- neighbor_freqs %>%
    filter(freq >= adj_threshold) %>%
    pull(locus) %>%
    unique()

  # Keep only those loci not found in any neighbors above threshold
  good_loci <- common %>%
    filter(!locus %in% disqual_loci) %>%
    mutate(non_adj_pair = paste(pop1, pop2, sep = "_"))

  return(good_loci)
})


# Result: high_freq_non_adj gives loci with high freq in non-adjacent pops

pdf(here(plotpath, "nonadjacency_test.pdf"))
dat_filtered <- dat %>% filter(locus %in% result$locus)
ggplot(dat_filtered) +
  geom_sf(data = ca) +
  geom_sf(aes(col = dos)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c() +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  facet_wrap(~locus) +
  labs(title = "High frequency loci in non-adjacent populations")
dev.off()
```

```{r}
# STEP 1: Compute both alternate and reference allele frequencies
freqs_both <- dat %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  group_by(cluster, locus) %>%
  summarize(
    alt_freq = mean(dos, na.rm = TRUE),
    ref_freq = 1 - alt_freq,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(alt_freq, ref_freq), names_to = "allele", values_to = "freq")
# Thresholds
non_adj_threshold <- 0.4
adj_threshold <- 0.1

all_clusters <- unique(freqs_both$cluster)

non_adj_pairs <- combn(all_clusters, 2, simplify = FALSE) %>%
  keep(~ !are.connected(adj_graph, .x[1], .x[2]))

# Detect for both reference and alternate alleles
result_both <- map_dfr(non_adj_pairs, function(pair) {
  pop1 <- pair[1]
  pop2 <- pair[2]

  # Loop through both allele types
  map_dfr(c("alt_freq", "ref_freq"), function(allele_type) {
    f1 <- freqs_both %>% filter(cluster == pop1, allele == allele_type, freq > non_adj_threshold)
    f2 <- freqs_both %>% filter(cluster == pop2, allele == allele_type, freq > non_adj_threshold)

    common <- inner_join(f1, f2, by = "locus", suffix = c("_1", "_2"))

    if (nrow(common) == 0) return(NULL)

    # Neighbors of pop1 and pop2
    neighbors1 <- names(which(adj_mat[pop1, ]))
    neighbors2 <- names(which(adj_mat[pop2, ]))
    neighbors <- setdiff(unique(c(neighbors1, neighbors2)), pair)

    if (length(neighbors) == 0) return(common)

    # Check allele freq in neighbors
    neighbor_freqs <- freqs_both %>%
      filter(cluster %in% neighbors, locus %in% common$locus, allele == allele_type)

    disqual_loci <- neighbor_freqs %>%
      filter(freq >= adj_threshold) %>%
      pull(locus) %>%
      unique()

    good_loci <- common %>%
      filter(!locus %in% disqual_loci) %>%
      mutate(non_adj_pair = paste(pair, collapse = "_"),
             allele = allele_type)

    return(good_loci)
  })
})

pdf(here(plotpath, "nonadjacency_test.pdf"))
length(unique(result$locus))
dat_filtered <- dat %>% filter(locus %in% result$locus)
ggplot(dat_filtered) +
  geom_sf(data = ca) +
  geom_sf(aes(col = dos)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c() +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  facet_wrap(~locus) +
  labs(title = "High frequency loci in non-adjacent populations")
dev.off()

```

```{r}
detect_high_freq_nonadj_loci <- function(freqs_both, adj_graph, min_separation = 1,
                                         non_adj_threshold = 0.4,
                                         adj_threshold = 0.1) {
  all_clusters <- unique(freqs_both$cluster)

  # Get all non-adjacent pairs
  non_adj_pairs <- combn(all_clusters, 2, simplify = FALSE) %>%
    keep(~ !are.connected(adj_graph, .x[1], .x[2]))

  # Loop through non-adjacent pairs and test allele freq pattern
  result <- map_dfr(non_adj_pairs, function(pair) {
    pop1 <- pair[1]
    pop2 <- pair[2]

    map_dfr(c("alt_freq", "ref_freq"), function(allele_type) {
      # High-freq in both non-adjacent pops
      f1 <- freqs_both %>% filter(cluster == pop1, allele == allele_type, freq > non_adj_threshold)
      f2 <- freqs_both %>% filter(cluster == pop2, allele == allele_type, freq > non_adj_threshold)

      common <- inner_join(f1, f2, by = "locus", suffix = c("_1", "_2"))
      if (nrow(common) == 0) return(NULL)

      # Get all populations within min_separation hops from either pop
      dists1 <- distances(adj_graph, v = pop1)[1, ]
      dists2 <- distances(adj_graph, v = pop2)[1, ]

      # Get all clusters within `min_separation` edges, excluding the pair
      near_clusters <- names(which((dists1 <= min_separation | dists2 <= min_separation) &
                                   !names(dists1) %in% pair &
                                   is.finite(dists1)))  # skip disconnected nodes

      if (length(near_clusters) == 0) return(common)

      # Check allele freq in those nearby clusters
      nearby_freqs <- freqs_both %>%
        filter(cluster %in% near_clusters, locus %in% common$locus, allele == allele_type)

      disqual_loci <- nearby_freqs %>%
        filter(freq >= adj_threshold) %>%
        pull(locus) %>%
        unique()

      good_loci <- common %>%
        filter(!locus %in% disqual_loci) %>%
        mutate(non_adj_pair = paste(pair, collapse = "_"),
               allele = allele_type)

      return(good_loci)
    })
  })

  return(result)
}

# Prepare freqs_both first (as in previous messages)
# Then run:

result <- detect_high_freq_nonadj_loci(
  freqs_both = freqs_both,
  adj_graph = adj_graph,
  min_separation = 3,        # At least 2 populations away
  non_adj_threshold = 0.5,
  adj_threshold = 0.05
)

voronoi_crop <- st_crop(pop_polygons, st_transform(ca, 3310))
ca <- st_transform(ca, 3310)
pdf(here(plotpath, "nonadjacency_test.pdf"))
length(unique(result$locus))
dat_filtered <- dat %>% filter(locus %in% result$locus)
ggplot(dat_filtered) +
  geom_sf(data = voronoi_crop, aes(fill = cluster), color = "black", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_sf(data = ca, fill = NA) +
  #geom_sf(aes(col = factor(dos))) +
  geom_sf(aes(col = cluster)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  facet_wrap(~locus) +
  labs(title = "High frequency loci in non-adjacent populations")
dev.off()

```

# DISTANCE BASED

```{r}

library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(units)

#-----------------------------#
# FUNCTION 1: Allele frequency
#-----------------------------#
compute_pop_frequencies <- function(sf_data) {
  sf_data %>%
    st_drop_geometry() %>%
    group_by(cluster, locus) %>%
    summarize(freq = mean(dos, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
}

#---------------------------------------------#
# FUNCTION 2: Get adjacent/nonadjacent clusters
#---------------------------------------------#
get_adjacent_clusters <- function(focal_cluster, dat_proj, dist_thresh) {
  focal_inds <- dat_proj %>% filter(cluster == focal_cluster)

  nearby_matrix <- st_is_within_distance(focal_inds, dat_proj, dist = dist_thresh)
  nearby_inds <- unique(unlist(nearby_matrix))

  neighbors <- dat_proj[nearby_inds, ] %>%
    filter(cluster != focal_cluster)

  adjacent_pops <- unique(neighbors$cluster)
  all_pops <- unique(dat_proj$cluster)
  non_adjacent_pops <- setdiff(all_pops, c(focal_cluster, adjacent_pops))

  list(adjacent = adjacent_pops, non_adjacent = non_adjacent_pops)
}

#--------------------------------------------------------------#
# FUNCTION 3: Find informative loci for a given focal cluster
#--------------------------------------------------------------#
find_private_loci <- function(focal_cluster, pop_freqs, adj_pops, nonadj_pops,
                              adj_threshold = 0.1, nonadj_threshold = 0.4, min_nonadj = 2) {
  focal_freqs <- pop_freqs %>% filter(cluster == focal_cluster)
  adj_freqs   <- pop_freqs %>% filter(cluster %in% adj_pops)
  nonadj_freqs <- pop_freqs %>% filter(cluster %in% nonadj_pops)

  high_in_focal <- focal_freqs %>% filter(freq > nonadj_threshold)

  good_loci <- high_in_focal$locus[!high_in_focal$locus %in% (
    adj_freqs %>%
      filter(locus %in% high_in_focal$locus, freq >= adj_threshold) %>%
      pull(locus)
  )]

  if (length(good_loci) == 0) return(NULL)

  matching_nonadj <- nonadj_freqs %>%
    filter(locus %in% good_loci, freq > nonadj_threshold) %>%
    group_by(locus) %>%
    filter(n() >= min_nonadj) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(focal_cluster = focal_cluster,
           nonadj_cluster = cluster) %>%
    select(focal_cluster, nonadj_cluster, locus, freq)

  if (nrow(matching_nonadj) > 0) return(matching_nonadj) else return(NULL)
}

#---------------------------#
# FUNCTION 4: Master wrapper
#---------------------------#
detect_private_loci <- function(dat, dist_thresh,
                                adj_threshold = 0.1,
                                nonadj_threshold = 0.4,
                                min_nonadj = 2,
                                crs_proj = 3310) {
  dat_proj <- st_transform(dat, crs = crs_proj)
  dist_thresh <- set_units(dist_thresh, "m")

  pop_freqs <- compute_pop_frequencies(dat_proj)
  all_clusters <- unique(dat_proj$cluster)

  results <- map(all_clusters, function(pop) {
    neighbor_info <- get_adjacent_clusters(pop, dat_proj, dist_thresh)

    find_private_loci(
      focal_cluster = pop,
      pop_freqs = pop_freqs,
      adj_pops = neighbor_info$adjacent,
      nonadj_pops = neighbor_info$non_adjacent,
      adj_threshold = adj_threshold,
      nonadj_threshold = nonadj_threshold,
      min_nonadj = min_nonadj
    )
  }) %>% compact()

  bind_rows(results)
}

final_result <- detect_private_loci(
  dat = dat,
  dist_thresh = 10000,
  adj_threshold = 0.1,
  nonadj_threshold = 0.1,
  min_nonadj = 2
)

pdf(here(plotpath, "nonadjacency_test.pdf"))
length(unique(final_result$locus))
dat_filtered <- dat %>% filter(locus %in% final_result$locus)
ggplot(dat_filtered) +
  geom_sf(data = ca) +
  geom_sf(aes(col = (dos))) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  facet_wrap(~locus) +
  labs(title = "High frequency loci in non-adjacent populations")
dev.off()

```


# PCA of all GEA SNPs [NOT CURRENTLY USED]

```{r}
process_pca <- function(path){
  pca <- read.table(path)
  pca <- 
    pca %>% 
    rename(SampleID = V2) %>% 
    select(-V1) %>% 
    rename(PC1 = V3, PC2 = V4, PC3 = V5) %>%
    # add RGB
    mutate(RGB_PC1 = scales::rescale(PC1, to = c(0, 1)),
           RGB_PC2 = scales::rescale(PC2, to = c(0, 1)),
           RGB_PC3 = scales::rescale(PC3, to = c(0, 1))
    )
  return(pca)
}

coords <- get_coords(sf = TRUE)
pca_genes <- 
  process_pca(here("analysis", "gea", "outputs", "genes.eigenvec")) %>%
  left_join(coords, by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(SampleID != "Scelocci_CHI1382_DAW5-46-21") %>%
  st_as_sf()
pca_nogea <- 
  process_pca(here("analysis", "gea", "outputs", "nogea.eigenvec"))  %>%
  left_join(coords, by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(SampleID != "Scelocci_CHI1382_DAW5-46-21") %>% 
  mutate(PC2 = -PC2, RGB_PC2 = scales::rescale(PC2, to = c(0, 1))) %>%
  mutate(PC1 = PC1, RGB_PC1 = scales::rescale(PC1, to = c(0, 1))) %>%
  mutate(PC3 = -PC3, RGB_PC3 = scales::rescale(PC3, to = c(0, 1))) %>%
  st_as_sf()

# Plot RGB 
outpath <- here("analysis", "gea", "plots")
pdf(here(outpath, "genes_pca.pdf"), width = 6, height = 3)
minvals <- min(pca_genes$PC1, pca_genes$PC2)
maxvals <- max(pca_genes$PC1, pca_genes$PC2)
leg <- 
  ggplot(pca_genes) +
  geom_point(aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = rgb(RGB_PC1, RGB_PC2, RGB_PC3))) +
  theme_void() +
  scale_color_identity() +
  annotate("segment", x = minvals * 1.1, xend = maxvals * 1.1, y = 0, yend = 0, arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm"))) +
  annotate("segment", x = 0, xend = 0, y = minvals * 1.1, yend = maxvals * 1.1, arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm"))) +
  annotate("text", x = maxvals * 1.1, y = 0, label = "PC1", color = "black", hjust = -0.1) +
  annotate("text", x = 0, y = maxvals * 1.1, label = "PC2", color = "black", vjust = -0.1) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(minvals * 1.4, maxvals * 1.4), ylim = c(minvals * 1.4, maxvals * 1.4))
plt <- 
  ggplot(pca_genes) +
  #geom_sf(data = ca) +
  geom_sf(aes(color = rgb(RGB_PC1, RGB_PC2, RGB_PC3))) +
  theme_void() +
  scale_color_identity()

plot_grid(plt, leg, ncol = 2, rel_widths = c(1, 1))


minvals <- min(pca_nogea$PC1, pca_nogea$PC2)
maxvals <- max(pca_nogea$PC1, pca_nogea$PC2)
leg <- 
  ggplot(pca_nogea) +
  geom_point(aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = rgb(RGB_PC1, RGB_PC2, RGB_PC3))) +
  theme_void() +
  scale_color_identity() +
  annotate("segment", x = minvals * 1.1, xend = maxvals * 1.1, y = 0, yend = 0, arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm"))) +
  annotate("segment", x = 0, xend = 0, y = minvals * 1.1, yend = maxvals * 1.1, arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm"))) +
  annotate("text", x = maxvals * 1.1, y = 0, label = "PC1", color = "black", hjust = -0.1) +
  annotate("text", x = 0, y = maxvals * 1.1, label = "PC2", color = "black", vjust = -0.1) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(minvals * 1.4, maxvals * 1.4), ylim = c(minvals * 1.4, maxvals * 1.4))
plt <- 
  ggplot(pca_nogea) +
  #geom_sf(data = ca) +
  geom_sf(aes(color = rgb(RGB_PC1, RGB_PC2, RGB_PC3))) +
  theme_void() +
  scale_color_identity()

plot_grid(plt, leg, ncol = 2, rel_widths = c(1, 1))
dev.off()
```
